description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
An unoccupied Zoox autonomous vehicle was traveling on westbound Duboce Avenue in the middle lane in dense traffic, preparing to 
change lanes to the right to turn right onto Valencia Street in San Francisco. At that time, a passenger vehicle (Vehicle 2) was traveling 
directly behind. The Zoox vehicle slowed to a gradual stop and then started to move forward, waiting for a gap in traffic to change lanes to 
the right, when Vehicle 2 driver passed it on the left side, striking the left rear fender. The Vehicle 2 driver did not stop at the scene to 
exchange information. The Zoox vehicle resumed operation and returned to base for inspection. The Zoox vehicle was found to have 
sustained minor damage. There were no reported injuries, and police were not notified. 
Print
Clear Form
